name: Do I get paid for missed work from injury in Riverton Utah?

mainEntity.name: Do I get paid for missed work from injury in Riverton Utah?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, temporary total disability pays ~2/3 average weekly wage tax-free while off.[1] Covers until max medical improvement.[1] Key factors: Doctor restricts work; prove wage loss; max benefits vary by state caps.[5] Practical guidance: Submit wage stubs, attend therapy, log lost shifts. Settlements lump-sum later.
